hero_image_prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing collaborative project management interface. Clean, professional workspace with multiple team members collaborating, digital kanban boards, and analytics charts. Soft blue and teal color palette, minimalist design.

sections.headline: Simplify Team Workflows with Intelligent Project Management
sections.subheadline: Flowdesk combines powerful collaboration tools, AI-driven insights, and intuitive design to help your team work smarter, not harder.

cards.title: AI-Powered Workflow Optimization
cards.description: Our intelligent algorithm analyzes your team's work patterns and suggests productivity improvements in real-time.

cards.title: Seamless Team Collaboration
cards.description: Real-time messaging, task assignment, and progress tracking keep everyone aligned and informed.

cards.title: Comprehensive Analytics Dashboard
cards.description: Gain deep insights into team performance, bottlenecks, and potential areas of improvement with our advanced reporting.

images.prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing collaborative project management interface. Clean, professional workspace with multiple team members collaborating, digital kanban boards, and analytics charts. Soft blue and teal color palette, minimalist design.
